title: FMR / FNMR Tradeoff
html: Stub. False Match Rate vs False Non-Match Rate — the fundamental dial in any biometric recognition system. Lower FMR = more security but more rejected legitimate users. Identification mode multiplies the FMR by database size, which is why a 0.001% verification FMR becomes a 10% identification FMR at 10,000 users. First mentioned in 2025 04 27 biometrics fmr fnmr cost benefit.

related.label: Biometrics survey — FMR/FNMR, identification vs verification, cost-benefit
